description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can featuring the iconic Pepsi branding. The can is cylindrical with a slightly domed top and bottom, and it is predominantly dark blue in color. The front displays the classic Pepsi logo—a red, white, and blue sphere—along with the word 'pepsi' in white, vertically aligned. Nutritional information, a barcode, and other product details are printed on the side. The can has a metallic pull-tab on the top for opening. The surface appears smooth and glossy, typical of modern soda cans, and there are no visible dents or imperfections.
description: A dark blue Pepsi aluminum can with a glossy finish, featuring the Pepsi logo and product details. The can is smooth, cylindrical, and undamaged.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepsi logo and vertical 'pepsi' text on a dark blue background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information, barcode, and product details.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with the Pepsi logo and partial barcode visible, less text detail.
description_view_3: Back view with minimal branding, mostly plain blue surface and a small icon.
attribute_label_or_branding: Pepsi logo (red, white, blue sphere), vertical 'pepsi' text in white, nutritional information, barcode, and product details in white on blue background.
